text.p: I indeed appreciate the forward messages. Thanks a lot. I've forwarded ASAP to another colleague.

I learnt you're on sabbatical, right? So where are you? Don't forget I look up to you for directions on some issues bordering on career growth. We have very similar research interests and specialization and you've actually achieved what I hope to achieve: you see what I mean? I don't have a mentor here sincerely. So I will always value your opinions and contributions. The attached document is the article I told you about. I wish to send it to World Englishes. Kindly go through. It's something you can read at one sitting. Let me have your opinion especially as regard theory. I do not really see what "theory" this type of article should employ. If I can have it back this week, that'll be great. God bless you.

As I research on blogs I discover that the Nigerian presence is almost non-existent. It appears that blogging is not yet known among us (Nigerians). I also discover that many of the blogs are in other languages other than English. I remember that you advised me to relate my study of blogs to the Nigerian situation. I'm afraid I may have to give up on my proposed topic on blogs since the Nigerian dimension may be lacking and do something on e-mails. Is this alright with you? God bless you.

I am indeed very sorry that I have not been in touch with you. I have been bugged down with a lot of admin work here and as if that was not enough somebody hacked my email box and made it impossible to contact people. And I sincerely hope the idiot did not contact you too soliciting money pretending to be me! I eventually got your address fro Dr in .
I am indeed very sorry that I couldn't make the dead line. However this is my new e-mail address you can always use it to get in touch with me.
I hope the book comes out okay!
